Off Calendar Nov-28-2005 Continued To Dec-07-05 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Deidre M. Digrande for plaintiff and moving party: David Salma

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modifications.
Plaintiff's motion for a protective order: Granted in part.
Counsel for defendant may not disclose or permit to be disclosed to defendants, members of the defendants' family, or anyone else, the addresses, or telephone numbers of any person described in responses to discovery unless specifically permitted to do so by the court after a hearing and a showing of good cause.

Notwithstanding the above, counsel for defendants may disclose or permit to be disclosed the names, addresses, or telephone numbers of any person described in responses to discovery to persons employed by counsel to assist in the preparation of the case, if that disclosure is required for that preparation. Persons provided this information by counsel shall be informed that further dissemination of the information constitutes a violation of a court order.
Parties to submit orders. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Deidre M. Digrande for plaintiff and opposing party: David Salma

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted WITH MODIFICATIONS. Defendant's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories: Granted, subject to a protective order as specified below, plaintiff is ordered to serve further verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. As to the responses to form interrogatory 17.1, the answers are deficient because they do not state underlying facts.
PARTIES TO SUMIT ORDERS. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
